objective: Expose optional model extras and zero-question discovery through kbrouter and kb-models
prefetch: Read the slice plan and listed source files before broader search
constraints: No catalog file created by default
acceptance_criteria: Dead adapters do not block current-model work
Secrets and unsafe endpoints are rejected
model_tier_reason: Network discovery and user-local policy are security-sensitive public CLI behavior
escalation_triggers: Codex catalog format differs from captured/live evidence
Doctor would need a mutating probe
